name: Crispy Coated Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the soup mix in the pouch.
2. Combine the soup mix, bread crumbs, and pepper.
3. Beat together the egg and water. Dip the chicken into the egg mixture; coat with the crumb mixture.
4. Place the chicken on a baking sheet. Drizzle with margarine.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink.
